title_en: GAIA-1 brings world models into autonomous driving narratives
title_zh: GAIA-1 将世界模型引入自动驾驶主叙事
description_en: Wayve shows how world-model framing can support driving simulation and forecasting.
description_zh: Wayve 展示了世界模型叙事如何服务自动驾驶仿真与预测。
why_it_matters: Marks a major vertical application beyond games.
